body_transformation: The rounded head retains its shape but becomes semi-translucent with faint violet energy currents flowing beneath its surface, while the short stubby legs dissolve into wispy shadows at the base. Pointed ears elongate slightly and thin into ethereal tendrils of pale silver mist, curling inward as if drawn by unseen forces. The compact body develops a subtle internal glow of deep violet light, its edges dissolving into thin air with ghostly white mist clinging to its form. The curled tail tip transforms into a tattered, wispy appendage trailing shadowy vapour, its spiral shape preserved but rendered as a spectral echo of its original form.
signature_feature: Tail tip: tattered ghostly mist trailing shadowy vapour, spiral shape preserved.
